prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4715→5222→4921→7356→6109，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年曾大幅后移至7356名，2025年回升至约6109名，近两年波动幅度约1247 名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年115人、2022年119人、2023年123人、2024年125人、2025年126人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划大幅增至164人， 较2025年扩招38人（增幅约30%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局有重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第13名（Top20） ，近年排名稳定在前15，学校层次极高，品牌号召力强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据存疑等），但2025年周期偏正面 （报考热情影响、校方回应积极）；抖音热度排名第29（较热），综合热度约142万，关注度中等偏上。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在多省出现断档，2023年有投档线下降记录 ，但2024–2025年未见明显断档信号；中山大学拥有A-及以上学科23个，代表性学科包括生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A-、口腔医学A-、计算机科学与技术A -、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、药学A等，学科综合实力位居全国前列，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等 专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐或推荐，与中山大学优势学科高度重合；湖北2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年（历史类14.14万+物理类24.98万≈39.12万）略有增加 ，物理类考生估算约25.15万，竞争略加剧；中山大学位于广东省（非本省），在湖北省无本地招生倾斜；该校全国招生 总量约5000–6000人，湖北物理类招生占比约2%–3%，属跨省报考，无地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6109名、2026年大幅扩招38人（+30%）使位次后移压力 显著、学校顶尖品牌和优势学科对位次有支撑、湖北考生总数微增等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次约7165名，区间6665–7665名；扩招是位次后移的最关键因素，学校层 次和学科实力起到缓冲作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4715 → 5222 → 4921 → 7356 → 6109, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 7356, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 6109, with a fluctuation range of about 1247 places in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 115 in 2021, 119 in 2022, 123 in 2023, 125 in 2024, and 126 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 164, an expansion of 38 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 30%), which is a notable expansion that will have an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 13th (Top 20) on the main list, and has been stable in the top 15 in recent years. The university's level is extremely high, with strong brand appeal. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (such as questionable paper data), but in the 2025 cycle, it was slightly positive (due to application enthusiasm and positive responses from the university). Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.42 million, indicating moderate to high attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, and a decrease in admission scores in 2023, but no obvious gap signals were seen in 2024–2025. Sun Yat-sen University has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including representative disciplines such as Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Stomatology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, etc. Its comprehensive disciplinary strength ranks among the top in the country, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology were all highly recommended or recommended in 2024–2026, highly overlapping with Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hubei is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (141,400 in History Category + 249,800 in Physics Category ≈ 391,200). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 251,500, indicating slightly intensified competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong Province (not the home province), so there is no local enrollment preference in Hubei. The university's total national enrollment is about 5,000–6,000 students, with Hubei's Physics Category enrollment accounting for about 2%–3%, making it a cross-province application with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6109, the significant expansion of 38 students (+30%) in 2026, which puts downward pressure on rankings, the support from the university's top brand and advantageous disciplines, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 7165, with a range of 6665–7665. The expansion is the most critical factor causing the ranking to drop, while the university's level and disciplinary strength act as a buffer.

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6665–7665, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Intelligent Science and Technology, Microelectronics, New Energy, Mathematics, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3, Computer Science) as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6665), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 7665), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Sun Yat-sen University's A+ disciplines (Business Administration, Ecology) and A disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Pharmacy, Basic Medicine, etc.) cover multiple enrollment majors, and the overall disciplinary strength is robust.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 835 → 851 → 758 → 960 → 959, with recent fluctuations between 758 and 960. In 2023, it rose to 758 (best in recent years), and stabilized around 960 in 2024–2025, remaining basically flat in the last two years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 43 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, showing a gradual slight decrease then stabilization. The 2026 plan is 39, a slight increase of 1 (+2.6%) from 2025, with minimal expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities. It has a very high school level and strong brand appeal. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (academic misconduct incidents), but it was slightly positive in the 2025 cycle. Its Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.42 million. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, and a record of declining admission scores in 2023, but no obvious anomalies in 2024–2025. Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category include Chinese Language and Literature (A), Philosophy (A-), Law (A-), Sociology (A-), Business Administration (A+), Applied Economics (A-), and Foreign Languages and Literature (A-). Its strong liberal arts strength attracts History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Major popularity is polarized: Law (divided, wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), Journalism and Communication (clearly advised against), Business Administration (divided, wait-and-see). 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 959, the slight increase of 1 in the 2026 plan causing a slight backward shift in ranking, a slight increase in Hubei History Category candidates, and the support from the university's top brand and strong liberal arts disciplines, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 989, with a range of 876–1102. The slight adjustment in enrollment plan and the slight increase in total candidates are the main factors for the slight backward shift in ranking, while the school level and disciplinary strength play a stabilizing role.
